options: They have same shape and size
questions.correctAnswer: They have same shape and size
questions.explanation: Congruent triangles have exactly the same shape and size. All corresponding sides and angles are equal.

questions.text: SSS congruence rule requires three sides to be equal.
questions.explanation: SSS (Side-Side-Side) congruence rule states that if three sides of one triangle equal three sides of another, they are congruent.
CPCT means that if two triangles are congruent, their corresponding parts (sides and angles) are equal.

questions.text: In RHS congruence, H stands for ________.
questions.explanation: RHS congruence rule: Right angle - Hypotenuse - Side. Used for right-angled triangles.
